# Gradle Version Catalog Templates

Generated by `/migrate-init` into `gradle/libs.versions.toml`. Choose template based on `output_type`
in `.migration/config.json`.

**Rule:** ZERO hardcoded versions in `build.gradle.kts`. Every version lives here.

---

## Service: `libs.versions.toml`

Full Spring Boot 4.x service — REST/gRPC, persistence, observability, security, resilience.

```toml
# =============================================================================
# Gradle Version Catalog — Service (Spring Boot 4.x)
# Generated by /migrate-init for output_type = "service"
# =============================================================================

[versions]
# --- Core Framework ---
spring-boot = "4.0.2"
spring-dependency-management = "1.1.7"
spring-modulith = "1.3.0"

# --- Code Generation ---
mapstruct = "1.6.3"

# --- Observability ---
otel = "1.44.0"
otel-instrumentation = "2.12.0"
micrometer = "1.14.3"
logstash-logback = "8.0"

# --- Resilience ---
resilience4j = "2.3.0"
caffeine = "3.1.8"

# --- Testing ---
archunit = "1.3.0"
testcontainers = "1.20.4"
instancio = "5.2.0"
wiremock = "3.12.0"

# --- Build Plugins ---
graalvm-native = "0.10.4"

[libraries]
# --- Spring Boot Starters ---
spring-boot-starter-web = { module = "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-web" }
spring-boot-starter-data-jpa = { module = "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-data-jpa" }
spring-boot-starter-validation = { module = "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-validation" }
spring-boot-starter-actuator = { module = "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-actuator" }
spring-boot-starter-security = { module = "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-security" }
spring-boot-starter-cache = { module = "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-cache" }
spring-boot-starter-test = { module = "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-test" }

# --- Spring Modulith ---
spring-modulith-starter-core = { module = "org.springframework.modulith:spring-modulith-starter-core", version.ref = "spring-modulith" }
spring-modulith-test = { module = "org.springframework.modulith:spring-modulith-test", version.ref = "spring-modulith" }

# --- Observability ---
micrometer-tracing-bridge-otel = { module = "io.micrometer:micrometer-tracing-bridge-otel", version.ref = "micrometer" }
otel-exporter-otlp = { module = "io.opentelemetry:opentelemetry-exporter-otlp", version.ref = "otel" }
otel-instrumentation-spring-boot = { module = "io.opentelemetry.instrumentation:opentelemetry-spring-boot-starter", version.ref = "otel-instrumentation" }
logstash-logback-encoder = { module = "net.logstash.logback:logstash-logback-encoder", version.ref = "logstash-logback" }

# --- Resilience ---
resilience4j-spring-boot3 = { module = "io.github.resilience4j:resilience4j-spring-boot3", version.ref = "resilience4j" }
caffeine = { module = "com.github.ben-manes.caffeine:caffeine", version.ref = "caffeine" }

# --- Code Generation ---
mapstruct = { module = "org.mapstruct:mapstruct", version.ref = "mapstruct" }
mapstruct-processor = { module = "org.mapstruct:mapstruct-processor", version.ref = "mapstruct" }

# --- Testing ---
archunit-junit5 = { module = "com.tngtech.archunit:archunit-junit5", version.ref = "archunit" }
testcontainers-bom = { module = "org.testcontainers:testcontainers-bom", version.ref = "testcontainers" }
testcontainers-junit-jupiter = { module = "org.testcontainers:junit-jupiter", version.ref = "testcontainers" }
testcontainers-postgresql = { module = "org.testcontainers:postgresql", version.ref = "testcontainers" }
instancio-junit = { module = "org.instancio:instancio-junit", version.ref = "instancio" }
wiremock-standalone = { module = "org.wiremock:wiremock-standalone", version.ref = "wiremock" }

[bundles]
# Group related dependencies for atomic declaration in build.gradle.kts
observability = [
    "micrometer-tracing-bridge-otel",
    "otel-exporter-otlp",
    "otel-instrumentation-spring-boot",
    "logstash-logback-encoder",
]
testing = [
    "archunit-junit5",
    "testcontainers-junit-jupiter",
    "instancio-junit",
    "wiremock-standalone",
    "spring-modulith-test",
]

[plugins]
spring-boot = { id = "org.springframework.boot", version.ref = "spring-boot" }
spring-dependency-management = { id = "io.spring.dependency-management", version.ref = "spring-dependency-management" }
graalvm-native = { id = "org.graalvm.buildtools.native", version.ref = "graalvm-native" }
```

### Service `build.gradle.kts` usage:

```kotlin
plugins {
    java
    alias(libs.plugins.spring.boot)
    alias(libs.plugins.spring.dependency.management)
    alias(libs.plugins.graalvm.native)
}

dependencies {
    implementation(libs.spring.boot.starter.web)
    implementation(libs.spring.boot.starter.data.jpa)
    implementation(libs.spring.boot.starter.validation)
    implementation(libs.spring.boot.starter.actuator)
    implementation(libs.spring.boot.starter.security)
    implementation(libs.spring.boot.starter.cache)
    implementation(libs.spring.modulith.starter.core)
    implementation(libs.bundles.observability)
    implementation(libs.resilience4j.spring.boot3)
    implementation(libs.caffeine)
    implementation(libs.mapstruct)
    annotationProcessor(libs.mapstruct.processor)
    testImplementation(libs.spring.boot.starter.test)
    testImplementation(libs.bundles.testing)
    testImplementation(platform(libs.testcontainers.bom))
}
```

---

## Library: `libs.versions.toml`

Minimal plain JAR — no Spring Boot plugin, no starters in runtime. Optional Spring
auto-configuration support via `compileOnly`.

```toml
# =============================================================================
# Gradle Version Catalog — Library (Plain JAR)
# Generated by /migrate-init for output_type = "library"
# =============================================================================

[versions]
# --- Logging (API only — consumers provide implementation) ---
slf4j = "2.0.16"

# --- Code Generation ---
mapstruct = "1.6.3"

# --- Optional Spring Support (compileOnly — consumers opt in) ---
spring-boot = "4.0.2"
spring-framework = "7.0.0"

# --- Testing ---
archunit = "1.3.0"
junit-jupiter = "5.11.4"
assertj = "3.27.2"
mockito = "5.15.2"

[libraries]
# --- API dependency (exposed transitively to consumers) ---
slf4j-api = { module = "org.slf4j:slf4j-api", version.ref = "slf4j" }

# --- Code Generation ---
mapstruct = { module = "org.mapstruct:mapstruct", version.ref = "mapstruct" }
mapstruct-processor = { module = "org.mapstruct:mapstruct-processor", version.ref = "mapstruct" }

# --- Optional Spring Support (compileOnly — not forced on consumers) ---
spring-context = { module = "org.springframework:spring-context", version.ref = "spring-framework" }
spring-boot-autoconfigure = { module = "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-autoconfigure", version.ref = "spring-boot" }

# --- Testing ---
junit-jupiter = { module = "org.junit.jupiter:junit-jupiter", version.ref = "junit-jupiter" }
assertj-core = { module = "org.assertj:assertj-core", version.ref = "assertj" }
mockito-core = { module = "org.mockito:mockito-core", version.ref = "mockito" }
archunit-junit5 = { module = "com.tngtech.archunit:archunit-junit5", version.ref = "archunit" }

[bundles]
testing = [
    "junit-jupiter",
    "assertj-core",
    "mockito-core",
    "archunit-junit5",
]

[plugins]
# java-library and maven-publish are built-in Gradle plugins — no version needed.
# No external plugins required for a plain library.
```

### Library `build.gradle.kts` usage:

```kotlin
plugins {
    `java-library`
    `maven-publish`
}

dependencies {
    api(libs.slf4j.api)
    implementation(libs.mapstruct)
    annotationProcessor(libs.mapstruct.processor)
    compileOnly(libs.spring.context)
    compileOnly(libs.spring.boot.autoconfigure)
    testImplementation(libs.bundles.testing)
}
```

---

## CLI: `libs.versions.toml`

Picocli-based command-line tool with optional GraalVM native image.

```toml
# =============================================================================
# Gradle Version Catalog — CLI (Picocli + GraalVM Native Image)
# Generated by /migrate-init for output_type = "cli"
# =============================================================================

[versions]
# --- CLI Framework ---
picocli = "4.7.6"

# --- Logging ---
slf4j = "2.0.16"
logback = "1.5.12"

# --- Code Generation ---
mapstruct = "1.6.3"

# --- Testing ---
archunit = "1.3.0"
junit-jupiter = "5.11.4"
assertj = "3.27.2"
mockito = "5.15.2"
system-stubs = "2.1.7"

# --- Build Plugins ---
graalvm-native = "0.10.4"

[libraries]
# --- CLI Framework ---
picocli = { module = "info.picocli:picocli", version.ref = "picocli" }
picocli-codegen = { module = "info.picocli:picocli-codegen", version.ref = "picocli" }

# --- Logging ---
slf4j-api = { module = "org.slf4j:slf4j-api", version.ref = "slf4j" }
logback-classic = { module = "ch.qos.logback:logback-classic", version.ref = "logback" }

# --- Code Generation ---
mapstruct = { module = "org.mapstruct:mapstruct", version.ref = "mapstruct" }
mapstruct-processor = { module = "org.mapstruct:mapstruct-processor", version.ref = "mapstruct" }

# --- Testing ---
junit-jupiter = { module = "org.junit.jupiter:junit-jupiter", version.ref = "junit-jupiter" }
assertj-core = { module = "org.assertj:assertj-core", version.ref = "assertj" }
mockito-core = { module = "org.mockito:mockito-core", version.ref = "mockito" }
archunit-junit5 = { module = "com.tngtech.archunit:archunit-junit5", version.ref = "archunit" }
system-stubs-jupiter = { module = "uk.org.webcompere:system-stubs-jupiter", version.ref = "system-stubs" }

[bundles]
testing = [
    "junit-jupiter",
    "assertj-core",
    "mockito-core",
    "archunit-junit5",
    "system-stubs-jupiter",
]

[plugins]
graalvm-native = { id = "org.graalvm.buildtools.native", version.ref = "graalvm-native" }
```

### CLI `build.gradle.kts` usage:

```kotlin
plugins {
    application
    alias(libs.plugins.graalvm.native)
}

application {
    mainClass = "com.company.tool.App"
}

dependencies {
    implementation(libs.picocli)
    annotationProcessor(libs.picocli.codegen)
    implementation(libs.slf4j.api)
    implementation(libs.logback.classic)
    implementation(libs.mapstruct)
    annotationProcessor(libs.mapstruct.processor)
    testImplementation(libs.bundles.testing)
}

graalvmNative {
    binaries {
        named("main") {
            mainClass = application.mainClass
            buildArgs.add("--no-fallback")
        }
    }
}
```

---

## SDK: `libs.versions.toml`

Library baseline plus binary compatibility checking (japicmp), documentation tooling,
and stability annotation infrastructure.

```toml
# =============================================================================
# Gradle Version Catalog — SDK (Library + Docs + Binary Compatibility)
# Generated by /migrate-init for output_type = "sdk"
# =============================================================================

[versions]
# --- Logging (API only — consumers provide implementation) ---
slf4j = "2.0.16"

# --- Code Generation ---
mapstruct = "1.6.3"

# --- Optional Spring Support (compileOnly — consumers opt in) ---
spring-boot = "4.0.2"
spring-framework = "7.0.0"

# --- Binary Compatibility ---
japicmp = "0.23.0"

# --- Testing ---
archunit = "1.3.0"
junit-jupiter = "5.11.4"
assertj = "3.27.2"
mockito = "5.15.2"

[libraries]
# --- API dependency (exposed transitively to consumers) ---
slf4j-api = { module = "org.slf4j:slf4j-api", version.ref = "slf4j" }

# --- Code Generation ---
mapstruct = { module = "org.mapstruct:mapstruct", version.ref = "mapstruct" }
mapstruct-processor = { module = "org.mapstruct:mapstruct-processor", version.ref = "mapstruct" }

# --- Optional Spring Support (compileOnly — not forced on consumers) ---
spring-context = { module = "org.springframework:spring-context", version.ref = "spring-framework" }
spring-boot-autoconfigure = { module = "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-autoconfigure", version.ref = "spring-boot" }

# --- Testing ---
junit-jupiter = { module = "org.junit.jupiter:junit-jupiter", version.ref = "junit-jupiter" }
assertj-core = { module = "org.assertj:assertj-core", version.ref = "assertj" }
mockito-core = { module = "org.mockito:mockito-core", version.ref = "mockito" }
archunit-junit5 = { module = "com.tngtech.archunit:archunit-junit5", version.ref = "archunit" }

[bundles]
testing = [
    "junit-jupiter",
    "assertj-core",
    "mockito-core",
    "archunit-junit5",
]

[plugins]
# japicmp plugin for binary compatibility verification on every build
japicmp = { id = "me.champeau.gradle.japicmp", version.ref = "japicmp" }
```

### SDK `build.gradle.kts` usage:

```kotlin
plugins {
    `java-library`
    `maven-publish`
    alias(libs.plugins.japicmp)
}

dependencies {
    api(libs.slf4j.api)
    implementation(libs.mapstruct)
    annotationProcessor(libs.mapstruct.processor)
    compileOnly(libs.spring.context)
    compileOnly(libs.spring.boot.autoconfigure)
    testImplementation(libs.bundles.testing)
}

// Binary compatibility check against last published version
japicmp {
    oldClasspath.from(/* previous published artifact */)
    newClasspath.from(tasks.jar)
    onlyModified = true
    failOnModification = true
    txtOutputFile = layout.buildDirectory.file("reports/japicmp.txt")
}
```

---

## Selection Rules

| `output_type` in config.json | Template to use | Key differentiator |
|------------------------------|----------------|--------------------|
| `service` | Service template | Spring Boot starters, observability, resilience |
| `library` | Library template | Minimal deps, `compileOnly` Spring, no plugins |
| `sdk` | SDK template | Library + japicmp plugin for binary compat |
| `cli` | CLI template | Picocli, logback, GraalVM native, system-stubs |

## Version Update Policy

- **Pin all versions** — no `+`, no `latest.release`, no open ranges
- **Update in ONE place** — only edit `[versions]` section
- **Use BOMs for multi-artifact projects** — e.g., `testcontainers-bom` for aligned TC versions
- **Lock file in CI** — run `./gradlew dependencies --write-locks` to detect drift
- **Annotation processors match library version** — e.g., `mapstruct` and `mapstruct-processor` share version ref
